case_title: QUINTAL, DONI et al vs. THAI, DOAN et al

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF APR-14-1998, OFF CALENDAR APR 14,1998 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-08-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY DAVID S GREENSEID HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DAVID S GREENSEID, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-02-1998 CONTINUED FROM JUN-17-1998 TO JUL-15-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-15-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 525 OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY DAVID S GREENSEID HEARING SET FOR SEP-02-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-02-1998, OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED ON 8-18-98.
